title: Translate to Spanish
content: Translate the following to Spanish: Welcome to ASU Next Lab, where we explore the future of AI in education.

title: Translate to French
content: Translate the following to French: Artificial intelligence is changing how we learn and teach.

title: Translate to Swahili
content: Translate the following to Swahili: Education is the most powerful tool we can use to change the world.

title: Translate to Arabic
content: Translate the following to Arabic: How can I help you today?

title: Translate to Chinese
content: Translate the following to Mandarin Chinese (simplified): This AI runs completely offline with no internet required.

title: Translate to Hindi
content: Translate the following to Hindi: What languages do you support?

title: What languages do you support?
content: What languages can you translate to and from?

title: Translate to Portuguese
content: Translate the following to Brazilian Portuguese: Local AI models protect your privacy because no data leaves your device.
